programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: Each team must earn an airboat ride to their vehicle before racing to the Mar-a-Lago Club in West Palm.

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: The action begins with a "Clubhouse Challenge" from Doral Golf Resort in Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: From Mallory Square to the renowned Key West party spot, Sloppy Joes, the action culminates on the southernmost golf course in America.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The players compete for a season-long Super Immunity prize, which could give one competitor a distinct advantage over his/her opponents.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The player holding Super Immunity receives an extra incentive to stay out of the elimination challenge. Competitors must make crucial decisions to earn immunity, and one player attempts to bait the competition into an early exit from the show.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Players must traverse the flop wall and successfully predict their opponents' outcomes in order to gain immunity; a questionable strategy threatens to send one player home.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Players must choose teams at breakfast; and one captain bases selections on personal relationships. Meanwhile, another player makes no friends in a move that turns the entire series on an emotional roller coaster.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Competitors must rely on one another to earn safety as team formats rule the challenges. A shaky performance must be overcome to keep the Super Immunity out of play, while an unexpected twist sends players directly to the elimination challenge.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A distinctive golf course feature becomes the setting for high drama as the players battle for immunity. One competitor's timely use of a mulligan earns safety, setting up an elimination match which comes down to the last putt.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The remaining competitors take a road trip south on the Grand Strand, where choosing the right opponents could prove lucrative for one player. Accuracy off the tee is tested, and an untimely error threatens to derail one contestant's dream.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: As the field dwindles, players must negotiate the limbo wall to secure immunity. One competitor commits a costly mental mistake which could lead to disaster. A surprise development brings Super Immunity back into the discussion.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The competition heats up and one of the most impressive shots in Big Break history highlights the fight for safety. The endgame for Super Immunity is in sight as the final four participants are determined.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The four remaining players vie for an advantage which will go a long way toward determining who will play in the championship match.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Two competitors remain. Only one will be crowned Champion of Big Break Florida. From the Omni Amelia Island Plantation Resort in Amelia Island, Fla.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Two-time major champion Cristie Kerr shares her insight on the full swing. Cristie breaks down all aspects to help with quality iron play, swing tempo and hitting a more consistent driver.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: 20-time LPGA winner and 2-time major champion Cristie Kerr serves up her very best short game instruction, including how to chip better from around the green, how to properly get up and down from tough rough lies and how to hole out of bunkers.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Cristie Kerr shares her insight on how to use everyday items in your golf bag that allows you to make more putts. Plus, how to read greens like a tour player and how to avoid three-putts by working on simple drills for lag putting.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Golf legend Annika Sorenstam shares her thought process and technique for shots around the green including pitches and chip shots.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Golf legend Annika Sorenstam shares her process for ball striking, from setup to in-swing fundamentals. Also, Annika demonstrates how to hit the driver longer or straighter based on the situation.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Annika Sorenstam discusses how she controlled her nerves to perform under pressure.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: U.S. Open and PGA Tour winner Graeme McDowell shares trade secrets on all things short game. McDowell gives step-by-step instructions on hitting off different surfaces and demonstrates how to make more putts with a simple, yet effective trigger.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: U.S. Open winner Graeme McDowell goes in depth on the fundamentals and key traits of the full swing. McDowell gives step-by-step instructions on how to shape shots, consistently hit accurate tee shots, and use body rotation to achieve proper timing.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.sub-title: Graeme McDowell - Fix The Big Miss
programme.desc: Graeme McDowell remedies the shots that miss big.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: PGA TOUR player Harry Higgs joins Bones on the course and shares his tips and strategies that led to his professional victories and success; Harry gives advice on swinging aggressively at conservative targets for a larger margin of error.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Hale Irwin teaches skills and strategies to help improve your golf game.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Hale Irwin shares tips and tricks on his short game.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Hale Irwin shares tips on how to sink more puts and his experience on the Ryder Cup team.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Bones takes on the role of caddie for YouTube sensation Rick Shiels, giving viewers an inside look at the strategies used by major champions. Rick gets in-depth advice for a variety of shots, and he gives insight on how to build confidence.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Bones takes on the role of caddie in Part 2 of this 2-part series with YouTube sensation Rick Shiels where they go in-depth on how shot shape and club selection are critical on a windy day; Rick picks Bones' brain on a variety of shots.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Jon Rahm shows how he uses his supreme power and touch around the greens to go low on the course. Rahm goes in depth to show how to strategically break down long putts into segments for an accurate read.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: PGA TOUR winner Joel Dahmen shares the tips and strategies that led to his journeyman success. Joel goes in depth on why he uses different putting styles during his round. Dahmen also discusses his thought process when he finds trouble off the tee.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: PGA Tour winner Keith Mitchell joins Bones on the course to share his tips and strategies that have led to his continued success.

programme.desc: GolfPass brings you thousands of lessons from the game's best instructors, original series, news, features and more.
